channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pitso Mosimane Vying for Bafana Bafana Head Coach Position After Broos' Exit
item.description: Pitso Mosimane has emerged as the leading candidate to succeed Hugo Broos as head coach of Bafana Bafana, following his recent presentation to the South African Football Association (Safa) technical c...

item.title: Mother charged with murder after four-year-old's body found on Central Coast
item.description: A 32-year-old woman has been charged with murder following the discovery of her four-year-old son's body on the Central Coast of New South Wales. Police arrived at a Wyong police station after the wom...

item.title: Seoul Officials Host World Cup Viewing Event at Gwanghwamun Square
item.description: The article details a public event organized by Seoul officials to watch the 2026 World Cup matches at Gwanghwamun Square. The event, which attracted thousands of spectators, aims to foster civic enga...

item.title: France win crucial World Cup match against Paraguay thanks to Mbappé's penalty
item.description: Kylian Mbappé scored a critical penalty in the 70th minute to secure France's 1-0 victory over Paraguay in a grueling World Cup clash. The match, held in Philadelphia under extreme heat (39°C), tested...

item.title: Pope Leo Condemns Global Leaders' Immorality and Calls for Moral Leadership
item.description: The article critiques the moral failures of prominent world leaders such as Donald Trump, Vladimir Putin, and Benjamin Netanyahu, arguing that their actions exemplify a systemic decline in ethical sta...

item.title: Tragedy in South Waziristan: Family suffers casualties from suspected drone strike
item.description: In South Waziristan, a suspected quadcopter drone attack on a house in the Nargasi area of Birmal tehsil has left three girls dead and four family members injured. Local sources report that munitions ...

item.title: Army Chief says operation to rescue abducted Oyo pupils and teachers is making significant progress
item.description: The Chief of Army Staff, Lieutenant General Waidi Shaibu, has said Nigerian troops are making significant progress in efforts to rescue the 39 pupils and seven teachers abducted from three schools in ...

item.title: Edo State Police Successfully Rescue 38 Kidnapped Victims in Major Operation
item.description: The Edo State Police Command has arrested 45 suspects linked to violent crimes and rescued 38 kidnapped victims in June 2026 through coordinated operations. Commissioner Monday Agbonika highlighted th...

item.title: Trump marks America's 250th anniversary with delayed Independence Day speech after storms disrupt Washington celebrations
item.description: US President Donald Trump addressed crowds in Washington, DC, during the America 250 Independence Day celebrations after severe thunderstorms forced a temporary evacuation of the National Mall and del...

item.title: David Beckham and Victoria Beckham celebrate 27th wedding anniversary with heartfelt posts
item.description: David Beckham and Victoria Beckham marked their 27th wedding anniversary by sharing nostalgic photos and heartfelt messages on social media. The football legend posted a series of throwback images sho...

item.title: Nemisa executives resign over financial misconduct allegations in R50m training program
item.description: The National Electronic Media Institute of South Africa (Nemisa) has experienced significant leadership changes following an investigation into financial misconduct linked to its R50m digital training...

item.title: Extreme Weather Events Impact Europe and Tanzania
item.description: Europe is experiencing an unprecedented heatwave that has claimed approximately 3,700 lives, while Tanzania faces unusually severe cold conditions. This highlights the extreme weather patterns affecti...

item.title: Toronto Jail Guard Attack Linked to Corruption Probe and Drug Networks
item.description: The article details a massive police corruption investigation in Toronto, codenamed Project South, which links an alleged attempted murder of a jail guard to a web of local crimes involving corrupt of...

item.title: Strategies to Reduce Teen Screen Time and Promote Real-World Engagement
item.description: The article discusses the challenges of managing excessive screen time for teenagers, emphasizing the need for parents to set clear boundaries and provide meaningful alternatives. It highlights strate...

item.title: Dalit Writer's Memoir Explores Caste and Home Through Translation
item.description: The article discusses the translation of Chandu Maheria's memoir 'Homes Without Windows,' which critiques caste-based discrimination and its impact on Dalit communities. It highlights how toilets symb...

item.title: EXO's Manila Concert Celebrates Hits and Fan Favorites
item.description: The article discusses the 'EXhOrizon' concert held in Manila by the South Korean boy band EXO, highlighting their performance of popular tracks and engaging with fans. The event, which took place on J...

item.title: Sharon Osbourne pays tribute to Ozzy on their 46th wedding anniversary
item.description: Sharon Osbourne has marked what would have been her 46th wedding anniversary with a heartfelt tribute to her late husband, Ozzy Osbourne, who passed away in 2025. Posting on Instagram, she reflected o...

item.title: A Neighbor's Vengeance: Water Pipe Sabotage and Crossbow Threats
item.description: This article details a prolonged conflict between two neighbors, Amanda and Richard Collins, and their landowner Francis. The dispute began when Francis sabotaged the water supply by cutting the pipe,...

item.title: Brandon Declares State of Emergency Amid Crisis
item.description: Brandon, Manitoba, has declared a state of emergency following a significant crisis that has impacted the city. The declaration, made by local authorities, comes amid concerns over public safety and i...

item.title: Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen Shares Admiration for Kenyan Celebrities and Warns Against Cyberbullying
item.description: Interior Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen has sparked online reactions after revealing the Kenyan celebrities he admires most during a TikTok Q&A session. The CS highlighted rapper and content cre...
